title: Hornet Removal in Freeport, Long Island | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Freeport, NY. Licensed experts safely eliminate hornet nests from homes and businesses. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets on your Freeport property? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Freeport and surrounding Long Island communities. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from residential and commercial properties, protecting your family, customers, and pets from painful stings.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Freeport homeowners and businesses with safe, effective hornet removal solutions. Our licensed technicians use proven methods and professional-grade equipment to completely eliminate hornet colonies while ensuring the safety of your property and the environment.
localContext: Freeport's waterfront location along the Nautical Mile and its mix of historic homes, modern residences, and bustling marinas create ideal nesting conditions for hornets in eaves, docks, and outdoor structures. We're familiar with the unique pest challenges faced by properties near the Freeport Recreation Center, Baldwin Bay, and throughout the village's residential neighborhoods.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Freeport?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout Freeport. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment at your earliest convenience, often arriving within hours for emergency situations. Most hornet nest removals are completed in a single visit lasting 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, safe elimination of the hornet nest using professional-grade treatments, removal of the physical nest structure when accessible, and a follow-up guarantee. Pricing varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements for safe removal.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Freeport's waterfront areas?
faqs.answer: Yes, Freeport's proximity to water and abundance of wooden structures, docks, and boat houses make it attractive to hornets seeking nesting sites. Hornets are particularly active from late spring through fall and often build nests under eaves, in attics, sheds, and around marina structures along the Nautical Mile and Baldwin Bay.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols during hornet removal. We'll advise you to keep family members and pets indoors during treatment, and the area is typically safe to access within a few hours after service completion. We prioritize safety while ensuring complete hornet elimination.
